## Observations

- You said your concern level was 1/5. It's good to hear you're not concerned, but you should be aware that AIs can still cause trouble even if you don't feel worried about it.
- You noted that 'our CEO' and 'regulators' may be concerned — you might want to check in with them.
- You indicated that your AI does not have any of these properties: *always truthful* or *unbiased*. These are properties worth examining even if your overall concern is low.
